primary_issue.title: prepare-task 应在 planner 阶段刷新 base 分支远程状态
primary_issue.reason: intake/handoff 主 issue，默认进入 close 候选。
acceptance_evidence: 实现 refresh_base_freshness_for_planner：planner-only 执行 git fetch origin <base>，不 fast-forward 本地 base，并输出 fetched/stale/diverged/fetch_failed freshness 证据。
python3 trellis/workflows/guru-team/scripts/python/test_guru_team_trellis.py 通过，127 tests OK，覆盖 planner-only stale/diverged/fetch_failed 与 executor 强刷新。
真实 dogfood prepare-task planner-only 验证：fetch_attempted=true、fetch_performed=true、fast_forwarded=false、remote_head_source=fetched、handoff_written=false、workspace_ready=false。
canonical 与 dogfood script/schema/workflow 已同步；check-dogfood-overlay-drift 通过且无 .new/.bak 残留。
